title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rail Vikas Nigam - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rail Vikas Nigam - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Distribution Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
